steps.title: Identify the maximum and minimum values
steps.content: In the list 17, 4, 20, 17, 18, 6, the maximum value is 20 and the minimum value is 4.

steps.title: Calculate the range
steps.content: Subtract the minimum from the maximum: $$20 - 4 = 16$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $16$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $16$.
